# To Comment or Not To Comment

> A Quarto RevealJS presentation by Indrajeet Patil.

A comprehensive guide to code commenting best practices for software development. Learn when, how, and why to write effective comments that enhance code clarity and maintainability.

## Primary URL

- [Slides](https://www.indrapatil.com/to-comment-or-not/)

## Source

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/IndrajeetPatil/to-comment-or-not/)

## Topics

- comments
- software engineering
- computer science
- software development
- code documentation
- presentation
- slides

## Machine-readable companion

- [Full agent summary](https://www.indrapatil.com/to-comment-or-not/llms-full.txt)
